scripts.build: yarn clean && yarn build:bundle:copy && yarn build:component
scripts.build:bundle:copy: yarn workspace @matterport/bundle build && yarn workspace @matterport/bundle dist:copy $(pwd)/built-bundle
scripts.build:bundle:link: yarn workspace @matterport/bundle build && yarn workspace @matterport/webcomponent bundle:link
scripts.dev: yarn dev:bundle:link-if-needed && yarn workspace @matterport/bundle dist:link $(pwd)/examples/vanilla/matterport-assets && webpack serve --config ./webpack.dev.config.cjs
scripts.dev:vite: yarn dev:bundle:link-if-needed && yarn dev:component && yarn dev:vite:quick
scripts.dev:vite:quick: yarn workspace @matterport/bundle dist:link $(pwd)/examples/vite/public/matterport-assets && cd examples/vite && yarn dev
scripts.dev:webpack: yarn dev:bundle:link-if-needed && yarn dev:component && yarn dev:webpack:quick
scripts.dev:webpack:quick: yarn workspace @matterport/bundle dist:link $(pwd)/examples/webpack/static/matterport-assets && cd examples/webpack && yarn dev
scripts.prepare-public: yarn workspace @matterport/bundle dist:copy $(pwd)/built-bundle && yarn replace-mp && cp ./built-bundle/LICENSE.md ./LICENSE.md
